registry_rules.entry_requirement: Implementations must complete the formal conformance certification process before registry inclusion.
registry_rules.scope: Registry inclusion is version-specific and protocol-release-specific.
registry_rules.non_authority_clause: Registry inclusion records verified conformance status and does not alter protocol semantics.
